name: telegram-personal
description: Use a private Telegram user account from Codex through a confirmation-gated local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Safely read and send Telegram messages from Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect a private Telegram user account locally, read dialogs and media, and require explicit confirmation before every send.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Telegram account for Codex.
Prepare a Telegram message for confirmation.
